persona: Backend and full-stack developers who use AI coding assistants and frequently wrangle large or unfamiliar JSON payloads (API responses, configs, logs).
valueProp: Give your AI assistant offline, dependency-free tools to validate, query, diff, format, and minify JSON without leaking data to external services.
usp: Pure-JS, zero external APIs or network calls — unlike most JSON MCP servers that wrap online validators or schema services, this runs fully local and bundles JSONPath, diff, and schema validation in one lightweight package.
topUseCases: Have the assistant JSONPath-query a huge API response to extract just the fields needed for debugging.
Diff two JSON config files (staging vs prod) and let the AI explain the meaningful changes.
Validate untrusted JSON payloads against a schema and auto-format or minify them inline during code review.
